text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Passing by the school store one day, I notice
they've set up a special section I've not seen
before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Cheerfully gazing up at the banner bearing the
words "Grand Opening!" is...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Superb! Such splendid workmanship! I'm sure the
trainers will be absolutely thrilled to see this!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're already here, Trainer
<username>?! Perfect timing!
Look closely!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: We've set up a new space within the store specifically for trainers! And today is the grand opening!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa points with great intensity to a
sign that says...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! It offers a wide range of convenient,
hand-picked, high-quality "training items"!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Make good use of them to ensure your trainee's
healthy development!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I listen in wonder as Director Akikawa joyfully
explains the different products that are available.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: ...And to top it all off, money is unnecessary!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! At this shop, you procure goods by
exchanging special coins!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
And what's more! These coins are awarded based
on race performances!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This all sounds far too good to be true. I gather
my resolve and ask point-blank.
choice_data_list: Um, where did you get the funds for all these—

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: D-Director?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Well if it isn't Tazuna! I was just giving Trainer
here a rundown of the Pro Shop.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: This shop is exactly what I'm here to discuss!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Director... You used your pocket money to go on
a massive shopping spree again, didn't you?!
choice_data_list:
I had a feeling that's how you stocked so many
items...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Verily! I'm funding all of this out of my own
pockets!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
And I've already established all my supply routes!
Expeditious!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the sentiment, but can't you ever do
things in moderation?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Wahahaha! No amount of money is too great
when it's spent on helping my beloved students!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ah, wait! This discussion isn't over!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Simply amazing!
choice_data_list: Whoa! How long have you been here?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm here to do some fieldwork for another
story. I thank the academy for its continued
cooperation.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: But I must say—this is amazing! Director Akikawa is willing to devote all of her personal funds to the students!
choice_data_list: Actually, I doubt this is even close to all of it...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: I simply must write an article on her!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
"Director Akikawa resolves to give all she has for
the Twinkle Star Climax!"

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: "And Trainer will sacrifice everything to help realize her hopes!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: How did it get to the point where I'm giving up everything too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I gaze out the window as I listen to Reporter
Otonashi chatter excitedly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I really am grateful to have access to the Pro
Shop, though. I need to take advantage of every
option available to me!
